description: Uploads a file to the asset store and returns a reference which can be used in a create or update
label: Store File

options.name: model
options.label: Model
options.info: The data model to put the file in.

options.label: URL
options.name: url
options.info: The URL to fetch from, it is expected that this file is publically available. For private files get them using a separate data source and store them using Store File Base64.

options.name: reference
options.label: File reference
options.info: Used to refer to a stored file
